first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions praise the candidate's extensive technical experience and entrepreneurial mindset while consistently noting the same concerns: a lack of an advanced degree and insufficient experience in high-level AI strategy. The minor differences in wording fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
